description_long: This is a modern business jet with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings, and a T-tail configuration. The aircraft features two rear-mounted turbofan engines integrated into the fuselage just ahead of the tail. The nose is sharply pointed, and the cockpit windows are large and wrap around the front, providing excellent visibility. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings. The exterior is finished in a light, uniform color with minimal markings, and the overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and luxury transport.
description: A sleek, light-colored business jet with swept low wings, T-tail, and twin rear-mounted turbofan engines. Features a streamlined fuselage and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the T-tail, twin rear-mounted engines, and the full wingspan with slight upward winglets.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit windows, and visible landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, wraparound cockpit windows, and the low-mounted swept wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the fuselage, cockpit, and landing gear from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted turbofan engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with large wraparound windows, likely multi-seat.
